{ "author": "Felix Geisendörfer <felix@debuggable.com> (http://debuggable.com/)", "contributors": [ "Mike Atkins <apeherder@gmail.com>" ], "name": "delayed-stream", "description": "Buffers events from a stream until you are ready to handle them.", "license": "MIT", "version": "1.0.0", "homepage": "https://github.com/felixge/node-delayed-stream", "repository": { "type": "git", "url": "git://github.com/felixge/node-delayed-stream.git" }, "main": "./lib/delayed_stream", "engines": { "node": ">=0.4.0" }, "scripts": { "test": "make test" }, "dependencies": {}, "devDependencies": { "fake": "0.2.0", "far": "0.0.1" } }
